Waterfront luxury, thoughtfully remodeled

A relaxed coastal retreat designed for everyday living.

Sun-filled interiors, soaring ceilings, an open floor plan, and seamless access to the waterfront patio create an easy indoor-outdoor lifestyle. Cruise the harbor, unwind in the private spa, entertain around the fire, or simply enjoy the view.

Peaceful primary suite

A spacious retreat with vaulted ceilings and abundant natural light.

The best room has no walls

Live where every day feels like a getaway.

Two sets of sliding doors open to a generous waterfront patio with low-maintenance decking, open-water views, dining and lounge areas, a fire feature, private spa, and direct access to the dock.

  • South-facing waterfront exposure
  • Private 35'+ U-shaped dock
  • Direct harbor and ocean access
  • Private spa and piped gas barbecue
  • No homeowners association
